name: TPBank
description: The Digital CB (Corporate Banking) division at TPBank is responsible for designing and optimizing digital experiences tailored to corporate clients. This includes a website application and mobile application that enable enterprise users to perform complex banking tasks such as bulk transfers, maker-checker approvals, and multi-tier authorization flows. In parallel, we also designed an admin configuration tool—an internal platform that allows bank staff to define approval hierarchies, manage user roles, and configure system behavior. As a UX/UI Designer, I contributed to improving both customer-facing interfaces and internal back-office tools, ensuring usability, scalability, and alignment with business requirements.
content:
Overview

Đây là nội dung test cho tpbank

The Digital CB (Corporate Banking) division at TPBank is responsible for designing and optimizing digital experiences tailored to corporate clients.

Design Process

We started with extensive user research, conducting interviews with corporate banking clients to understand their pain points and workflows.

"Designing for enterprise requires balancing complex functionality with intuitive interfaces that don't overwhelm users."

Outcome

The redesign resulted in a 50% boost in online visibility and significantly improved user satisfaction scores among corporate clients.

name: Luminaura
description: Brand identity and visual design system for Luminaura, a premium lighting brand. The project encompassed logo design, brand guidelines, packaging design, and digital presence.
content:
Overview

Luminaura needed a brand identity that reflected their commitment to quality craftsmanship and modern aesthetics in the premium lighting market.

Design Direction

We developed a warm, sophisticated visual language that draws inspiration from the interplay of light and shadow.

Results

The new brand identity helped Luminaura establish a strong market presence and increase brand recognition by 35%.

name: Clarity Craft
description: Product design and web experience for Clarity Craft, a hardware startup creating minimalist smart home devices. The project covered end-to-end product UX, packaging, and e-commerce website design.
content:
Overview

Clarity Craft approached us to design the complete product and digital experience for their debut smart home device line.

Design Philosophy

Minimalism was at the core of every design decision — from the physical product form to the website's clean, spacious layout.

Impact

The product launch achieved $2M in pre-orders within the first week, validating the design-led approach.

name: Veloxa
description: Framer development and motion design for Veloxa, a high-performance electric vehicle brand. Built an interactive marketing website with immersive scroll animations and 3D asset integration.
content:
Overview

Veloxa needed a digital presence that matched the premium, futuristic nature of their electric vehicles.

Technical Approach

We used Framer to build an interactive website with scroll-triggered animations, video backgrounds, and smooth page transitions that created an immersive brand experience.

Results

The website attracted over 10,000 unique visitors in the first week of launch.
